understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces, likely aiming to move them onto goal tiles or to reach specific positions, often requiring coordination between more than one piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed one grid cell at a time using directional actions. You can switch control between selectable pieces using CLICK with exact pixel coordinates. Some objects can be pushed if adjacent, while walls block movement in different ways. The movement._blocked fields provide hints, but experimentation is necessary to discover each object's true behavior.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces, likely aiming to move them onto goal tiles or to reach specific positions, often requiring coordination between more than one piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed one grid cell at a time using directional actions. You can switch control between selectable pieces using CLICK with exact pixel coordinates. Some objects can be pushed if adjacent, while walls block movement in different ways. The movement._blocked fields provide hints, but experimentation is necessary to discover each object's true behavior.
